name: Fix corrupt H264
desc: It recodes captures, that hasn't been stopped properly, causes glitches and long seeking times in video
cmd: ffmpeg -hwaccel videotoolbox -err_detect aggressive -fflags discardcorrupt -i {input} -vf "scale=1920:1080:force_original_aspect_ratio=decrease,pad=1920:1080:(ow-iw)/2:(oh-ih)/2" -c:v h264_videotoolbox -q:v 85 -profile:v high -pix_fmt yuv420p -g 250 -video_track_timescale 60000 -max_interleave_delta 0 -c:a aac -b:a 192k -movflags +faststart {output}
